description: This email template is designed to engage and inspire action around critical environmental issues such as climate change and global warming. It's perfect for non-profit organizations, activists, and anyone committed to sustainable practices and environmental preservation. The template is crafted to commemorate global observances and celebrations like Earth Day and similar worldwide environmental events. It's a powerful tactic to raise awareness, encourage participation in environmental activities, and promote the importance of a sustainable future for our planet. With its compelling content and striking visuals, this template can effectively convey your message and rally support for environmental causes.
short_description: Promote sustainable living and raise awareness about climate change with our engaging email design, ideal for non-profit organizations and activists. Perfect for Earth Day, World Environment Day observances. Inspire action towards a sustainable future!

designer.description:
I am a creative multidisciplinary person, with a broad vision in the world of design and communication. 
All of this, thanks to extensive experience in different fields: web design, online design, corporate identity, creation of web structures and functionalities, illustration, audiovisuals, apps, and even digital art.
